children.text: A member of the Air Force or the Space Force on active duty.
A current or former dependent of a member of the Air Force or the Space Force on active duty.
A current or former intimate partner who has a child in common or has shared a common domicile with a member of the Air Force or the Space Force on active duty.
Data setting forth victim demographics, injuries, autopsy findings, homicide or suicide methods, weapons, police information, assailant demographics, and household and family information.
System intervention and failures, if any, within the Department of Defense.
Recommendations for systemic changes, if any, within the Department of the Air Force and the Department of Defense.

children.heading: OSD .—Guidance
children.label: c OSD .—Guidance
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall prescribe guidance, which shall be uniform for the military departments, for the conduct of reviews by the Secretary under subsection (a).
